definitions: A pointless argument or competition, especially one characterized by a display of aggression or one-upmanship.
A dispute or contest in which participants try to outdo each other in a display of power, skill, or dominance.
examples: The meeting devolved into a pissing match over budget allocations.
It was just a pissing match between the two rival teams.
She refused to engage in another pissing match with her colleague.
